originalFamilyScopeSummary: fix(perps): render PerpsConnectionErrorView once across all provider instances
currentTriggerSummary: review-pr: fix(perps): deduplicate error view and analytics across connection providers
notes: The main PerpsScreenStack path is covered by PerpsGlobalErrorGate, but PerpsModalStack is still registered directly in MainNavigator outside that gate while its provider now suppresses its own error view. That leaves a modal entry path where connection errors may not render any error view.
